title: Sophisticated Backpack/Storage Emerald Upgrade
description: Enhance your Sophisticated Backpacks/Storage with the Emerald Upgrade! This upgrade boosts storage capacity beyond Netherite!!
body:
THANKS TO OUR SPONSORS

THANKS TO ZAP-HOSTING! Use code Reggarf-1047 for 20% off any order!

https://zap-hosting.com/reggarf

Sophisticated Emerald Upgrade

Enhance your Sophisticated Backpacks/Storage with the Emerald Upgrade! This upgrade boosts storage capacity beyond Netherite

Sophisticated Emerald Upgrade adds a brand new Emerald Tier to Sophisticated Storage and Sophisticated Backpacks, expanding progression beyond Netherite with larger capacity, upgraded stack sizes, and full compatibility with existing storage systems.

The mod is designed to feel like a natural extension of Sophisticated Storage while fully preserving wood variants, upgrades, inventory contents, colors, materials, and custom storage data during upgrades.

Features

New Emerald Tier Storage

Added Blocks

  • Emerald Barrel
  • Emerald Chest
  • Emerald Shulker Box
  • Emerald Limited Barrel I
  • Emerald Limited Barrel II
  • Emerald Limited Barrel III
  • Emerald Limited Barrel IV

Added Backpack

  • Emerald Backpack

Added Upgrades

  • Emerald Stack Upgrade
  • Emerald Storage Stack Upgrade
  • Emerald Mega Stack Upgrade

Full Wood Variant Support

All Emerald storage blocks automatically support every vanilla wood type:

  • Oak
  • Spruce
  • Birch
  • Jungle
  • Acacia
  • Dark Oak
  • Mangrove
  • Cherry
  • Crimson
  • Warped

Wood variants are preserved when upgrading storage.

Examples:

  • Spruce Netherite Barrel → Spruce Emerald Barrel
  • Cherry Netherite Chest → Cherry Emerald Chest

Emerald Upgrade Template

A new Emerald Upgrade Template is required to upgrade Netherite storage into Emerald Tier storage.

The template can be found as rare loot inside:

  • Desert Pyramids
